overview: Modern Age is a longevity-focused health clinic offering comprehensive care to slow aging. Evaluation includes blood work, bone density scans, and digital cognitive testing, with treatment planning led by board-certified clinicians.
highlights: In-house blood draws and bone density scans
IV Drip Therapy with 5 treatment options
Skin treatments including HydraFacial, injectables, and microneedling
targetAudience: Adults interested in proactive health optimization and anti-aging strategies, from beginners to experienced wellness-focused individuals.
